children.name:
AssertionError: 페이지 1과 페이지 2에 중복된 영화가 있습니다.
assert not {564, 1630423}
 +  where {564, 1630423} = <built-in method intersection of set object at 0x7f0c550ac660>({564, 44980, 249397, 530442, 936075, 976912, ...})
 +    where <built-in method intersection of set object at 0x7f0c550ac660> = {350, 564, 1734, 83533, 460465, 687163, ...}.intersection

AssertionError: ❌ 로그인 실패 메시지가 표시되지 않음
assert False
 +  where False = is_mismatch_error_message_displayed()
 +    where is_mismatch_error_message_displayed = <src.pages.kurly_login_page.KurlyLoginPage object at 0x7f8718a5c150>.is_mismatch_error_message_displayed
